label: The Gloam Lantern
description: The Gloam Lantern occupies a repurposed inspection hall beneath Cyrenth Bastion-City’s armored arcades, its walls faced in void-black adamantine plates scarred by impact scoring. Low, lumen-shielded fixtures cast regimented bands of light across riveted benches and a long ferrocrete bar, while air-scrubbers and brass-grilled vents maintain the city’s quarantine discipline. A shrine-niche of stamped aquilae and votive glass divides the drinking floor from a curtained ration counter, linking refreshment to the enclave’s logistics. Auspex-warning lamps hang above the thresholds, their hard color reflecting the bruise-hued aurorae that bleed through narrow slit-windows high in the facade.
